<!--
  This file is automatically read by GitHub to display in the issue/pull request templates.
  It helps users understand which template to use.
-->

# evo-agents Issue & PR Templates

## Issue Templates

### 🐛 Bug Report
**File:** `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md`
**When to use:** Report a bug or unexpected behavior

### ✨ Feature Request
**File:** `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md`
**When to use:** Suggest a new feature or enhancement

### 📚 Documentation
**File:** `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/documentation.md`
**When to use:** Report documentation issues or suggest improvements

### ❓ Question
**File:** `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/question.md`
**When to use:** Ask a question about using evo-agents

## Pull Request Template

### 🔄 Pull Request Template
**File:** `.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md`
**Purpose:** Guide contributors on what information to include in PRs

## Quick Links

* [Contributing Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
* [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
* [Security Policy](../SECURITY.md)
* [Changelog](../CHANGELOG.md)

## How to Create Templates

Create the following files in `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/`:

1. `bug_report.md`
2. `feature_request.md`
3. `documentation.md`
4. `question.md`

And in `.github/`:

1. `PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md`

See examples at: https://github.com/stevemao/github-issue-templates
